query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_active,
  SUM(CASE WHEN loginUsername IS NOT NULL AND loginUsername != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_username,
  SUM(CASE WHEN loginPassword IS NOT NULL AND loginPassword != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_password
FROM suppliers
WHERE isActive = 1;
